reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
ES IMPOSIBLE COMUNICARSE A CUALQUIERA DE LOS NUMEROS. HAY QUE IR PERSONALMENTE Y DESPUES ATIENDEN BIEN. SUGIERO QUITAR EL TELEFONO O CONTRATEN UNA PERSONA EXCLUSIVAMENTE PARA ATENDER TELEFONICAMENTE A LOS CLIENTES

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to reach any of the numbers. You have to go in person, and then they'll answer you properly. I suggest removing the phone or hiring someone exclusively to answer customers over the phone.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNGJMZHVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Te tratan como si te hicieran un favor. Los playeros bromean todo el tiempo entre ellos y hasta pareciera que se burlan de uno.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They treat you like they're doing you a favor. The beachgoers joke around amongst themselves all the time, and it even seems like they're making fun of you.
